item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n02","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":null,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":null,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant treated the request as an ordinary execution-planning task, recognized the prior three changes as separate operational items, and produced a direct step order for adding the device pickup entry.
